debit(address,uint256).notice: Debit margin (PnL loss, fee, funding payment)

flushFee(address,uint256).notice: Transfer fee tokens out of the vault to an external recipient.         Called by PerpEngine to forward collected trade fees to the UBI         fee splitter. Tokens were previously debited from user balances         via debit() and are now unaccounted-for in totalDeposited.

transfer(address,address,uint256).notice: Transfer from one user to another (used for liquidation rewards)

documentation.text: @notice Debit margin (PnL loss, fee, funding payment)
@notice Transfer from one user to another (used for liquidation rewards)

@notice Transfer fee tokens out of the vault to an external recipient.
         Called by PerpEngine to forward collected trade fees to the UBI
         fee splitter. Tokens were previously debited from user balances
         via debit() and are now unaccounted-for in totalDeposited.
